function.name: get_files_content
function.description: Return the contents of a file inside a working directory (up to 10000 chars).

working_dir.description: Path to the root working directory (must contain the target file).

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to working_dir.

function.name: get_files_info
function.description: Return a listing of a directory inside a working directory with file sizes and whether entries are directories.

working_dir.description: Path to the root working directory (must contain the target directory).

current_dir.description: Directory to list, relative to working_dir. Defaults to '.'.

function.name: write_files_content
function.description: Create or overwrite a file inside a working directory. Creates parent directories as needed.

working_dir.description: Path to the root working directory (target file must reside under this path).

file_path.description: Path to the file relative to working_dir to create or overwrite.

function.name: run_files
function.description: Run a Python file inside a working directory using a subprocess (enforces a timeout).

working_dir.description: Path to the root working directory; the file to run must be under this directory.

file_path.description: Path to the Python file relative to working_dir to execute.

timeout.description: Maximum allowed runtime in seconds before the process is terminated.
